bank.title: §l§b{0} Bank
bank.description: §6Info: Demand deposits use simple interest with a fixed daily rate of §a0.02%%§6, interest is based on principal, supports deposit/withdraw anytime; Fixed deposits offer 7, 30, 90 day terms, principal and interest returned at maturity, early withdrawal returns principal minus §a2%%§6 fee, interest forfeited
bank.current_hint: §aTip: Positive number to deposit, negative to withdraw
bank.early_withdraw_msg:
-------------------------
§cFixed deposit has not matured
§aWithdrawal incurs 2%% penalty on principal
§aPrincipal: {0} pts§c{1}§r
§cPenalty: {2} pts§c{1}§r
§aActual Return: {3} pts§c{1}§r
-------------------------
§eConfirm withdrawal?

pc.ip_verify_content: §aTo ensure server stability and fair play, we use IP verification. This identifies abnormal traffic, prevents attacks, and enables precise bans for serious violations. Your IP data is encrypted, admin-only, and auto-cleaned. You can disable this in Settings > Security, but it may reduce account protection. We balance privacy and community safety. Thank you!
